steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “gorgeous display” is decisive. “Gorgeous” describes something beautiful to observe, so “display” must mean a visible show or exhibition of the natural elements Mr. Bradford sees.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Exhibition” (choice D) directly matches what “display” conveys here: something shown for observation. The other choices don't express this meaning. This matches choice D — D is correct.
